data.title: Archer Aviation named preferred eVTOL air taxi partner for Republic of Serbia
data.description:
• Archer Aviation (ACHR) has been chosen by the Republic of Serbia as its preferred eVTOL air taxi partner ahead of EXPO 2027 in Belgrade.
  • Under an agreement, Serbia plans to showcase Archer’s Midnight aircraft and may purchase up to 25 aircraft, subject to the applicable legal framework. In addition, Archer and the Government of the Republic of Serbia plan to explore further development work on industrialization, including rare earth magnets and critical minerals for batteries.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Ozop Energy Solutions to acquire Varon
data.description:
• Ozop Energy Solutions (OZSCD) on Wednesday said it has entered into an agreement to acquire Varon, a functional beverage platform built for culture-driven scale, rapid commercialization, and capital-efficient growth across North America.
  • Financial terms of the deal were not disclosed.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Chevron set to finalize Singapore oil asset sale in Q1 - Reuters
data.description:
Chevron (CVX) plans to close a deal to sell its oil refining and distribution assets in Singapore in this year's Q1, as it engages in a final round of talks with global commodities trader Glencore (GLCNF) (GLNCY) and Japanese refiner Eneos, Reuters reported Wednesday.

The assets for sale, valued at $1B or more, include Chevron's (CVX) stake in a refinery, a terminal and retail stations in Singapore, and the company is looking to include retail stations in Cambodia and Malaysia in the deal, according to the report.

The sale is part of the company's plans to divest refining and storage assets in Asia as it restructures globally to streamline operations and reduce costs.

Chevron (CVX) holds a 50% stake in Singapore Refining Co., which operates a 290K bbl/day refinery in Singapore; partner PetroChina owns the remaining 50% share through its Singapore Petroleum Co. unit.

The deal also reportedly includes Chevron's (CVX) Penjuru terminal, which contains more than 400K cm of oil storage capacity, and 420 retail gas outlets in Malaysia, 26 in Singapore and 53 in Cambodia under Chevron's Caltex brand in the region.

Analysts say securing a fuel terminal and storage tanks at major fuel blending and bunkering hub Singapore will allow the buyer to have easy distribution access to southeast Asian import markets, Reuters explained in the report.

data.title: Venus Concept to voluntarily delist from Nasdaq and deregister with SEC; shares tumble
data.description:
• Venus Concept (VERO) announced it will voluntarily delist its common stock from the Nasdaq Capital Market and deregister with the SEC.
  • The decision was made despite Nasdaq compliance, as the board determined reporting costs outweigh the benefits of remaining listed.
  • The Company expects to file Form 25 around January 30, 2026, with the last Nasdaq trading day anticipated on or about February 6, 2026.
  • Venus Concept plans to file Form 15 around February 9, 2026, which will immediately suspend its SEC reporting obligations.
  • VERO shares down 54% premarket.

data.title: Uniti Group announces $500M senior notes offering
data.description:
Uniti Group (UNIT) on Wednesday announced an offering of $500M aggregate principal amount of 8.625% senior notes due 2032.

Shares were -0.53% pre-market to $7.46.

Within 60 days of the notes issuance, the company is set to file to obtain regulatory approval to enable the regulated subsidiaries to guarantee the notes.

Net proceeds are intended to be used to repay borrowings under a senior secured first lien term loan facility due 2031 and to pay related fees and expenses.

data.title: Super Group expects FY revenue between $2.17B and $2.27B
data.description:
• Super Group (SGHC) announced on Wednesday that the group expects both full-year revenue and adjusted EBITDA to land within the previously stated guidance ranges of $2.17B to $2.27B versus a  consensus of $2.22B and $555M to $565M, respectively.
  • The Group said it expects healthy growth to continue in 2026 as core business drivers remain strong.
  • Super Group’s Board of Directors has declared a special cash dividend of $0.25 per ordinary share. This dividend is payable on February 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on February 2, 2026.
  • SGHC +9.72% premarket to $10.61.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Prediction markets favor Netflix as takeover fight for WBD heats up
data.description:
Speculation over the future of Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) has intensified after Netflix (NFLX) moved to formalize its interest, setting the stage for a high-stakes contest in the media and entertainment sector.

In a regulatory filing released Tuesday, Netflix disclosed an updated proposal to acquire key parts of Warner Bros. Discovery in an all-cash transaction valued at $27.75 per share. The bid targets the company’s core studios and streaming operations, while its traditional television networks would be separated into a standalone entity under Discovery Global. 

The revised offer places Netflix in direct competition with a rival proposal backed by Paramount Skydance (PSKY). That group has put forward a higher headline price of $30 per share, but its bid encompasses the entirety of Warner Bros. Discovery, including its legacy TV assets—an approach that carries greater structural complexity and execution risk. 

Prediction markets suggest investors see Netflix as the frontrunner. Data from Kalshi shows a 69% implied probability that Netflix ultimately prevails, compared with a 17% chance for Paramount Skydance. Another 14% of market participants are betting that no transaction is completed before July 2027.

data.title: Zoned and Dairy MAX announce renewal of multi-year partnership
data.description:
• Zoned, a GameSquare (GAME) company, announced on Wednesday that it has renewed and expanded its multi-year partnership with Dairy MAX. 
  • Under the renewed partnership, Zoned will continue to build custom gaming experiences, new educational modules, influencer extensions, and content that further modernizes how dairy education is delivered.
  • The company said that the renewal comes on the heels of the widely acclaimed "Farm to Fork" initiative for Dairy MAX.
  • It added that "Farm to Fork" introduced a new model for mission-driven education inside Fortnite, beginning with Farm Tycoon in April 2024, an immersive world that teaches players how modern dairy farms operate.  In July 2025, the program expanded with Diner Tycoon, a second custom Fortnite world that brings the dairy journey full circle and allows players to run a diner, craft dairy-rich meals, and learn about nutrition and sustainability in an engaging, interactive format. 
  • GAME is down 1.44% premarket to $0.4105.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Talos Energy secures credit facility boost with borrowing base reaffirmation and maturity extension
data.description:
• Talos Energy (TALO) has entered into an amended and restated credit agreement that reaffirms the company's borrowing base at $700 million and extends the maturity date to January 20, 2030.
  • Talos  said it remains committed to maintaining a resilient balance sheet that prioritizes financial flexibility to execute our strategy, invest in high-return projects, and navigate commodity price cycles.

data.title: KindlyMD rebrands to Nakamoto
data.description:
• KindlyMD (NAKA) has changed its corporate name to Nakamoto to integrate its corporate identity with its long-term strategy in the Bitcoin ecosystem.
  • The healthcare business will continue operations through Kindly LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of Nakamoto. The company’s common stock and warrants will remain listed under the NAKA and NAKAW ticker symbols, respectively.
  • Since implementing its Bitcoin-focused strategy, the company has taken a series of steps to establish a scalable operating and treasury platform. These include the accumulation of a Bitcoin treasury worth more than $500M and the deployment of capital into strategic investments and treasury assets across multiple international markets.
